allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "feat: add HomePage with role-aware dashboard" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Create HomePage feature with welcome section showing user role and exercise list
- Display role-specific messaging for Exercise Director, Controller, and Observer
- Add quick actions \(Create Exercise for managers, View All Exercises for everyone\)
- Show up to 5 recent exercises with status, type, date, and practice mode indicator
- Include empty states with different UX for managers vs viewers

## Changes
- New `features/home/` module with HomePage and ExerciseList components
- Updated App.tsx to use new HomePage \(removed placeholder\)
- Added feature documentation in `docs/features/homepage/` with user stories

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify welcome section displays correct role name based on profile
- [ ] Verify "Create Exercise" button only appears for Manage role
- [ ] Verify "View All Exercises" button appears for all roles
- [ ] Verify exercise list shows up to 5 exercises \(excluding archived\)
- [ ] Verify empty state shows call-to-action for managers, informational for viewers
- [ ] Verify clicking exercise row navigates to detail page

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
